name: editorial-diagrams
description: Render editorial-style architecture diagrams (PNG/PDF/SVG) from a compact JSON spec via MCP.

transparent.title: Transparent PNG background
transparent.description: Render PNGs with a see-through background instead of white. Best when embedding on a coloured or dark surface.

format.title: Default output format
format.description: Format used when a render doesn't specify one: png, pdf, or svg.

scale.title: Raster scale (1–3)
scale.description: Resolution multiplier for the saved PNG file. 2 = retina. Higher = sharper but larger.

preview_width.title: Inline preview width (px)
preview_width.description: Max width of the preview Claude sees inline. The file on disk stays full resolution.

return_image.title: Inline image mode
return_image.description: How the rendered image comes back: auto (downscaled preview), full (full-res inline), none (path only), or link.

out_dir.title: Output folder
out_dir.description: Where rendered diagram files are written.
